title: ask-*/triad CDP focus-steal coverage via sentinel user-active yield
desc: ask gpt / ask claude / ask gemini / ask triad all route through ChromeLauncher + CDP attach which used to steal foreground focus (UIA hwnd attach, SetForegroundWindow). Combined mitigations this session: AppBotPipe allowlist for Minimized Chrome launch, RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync user-active silent yield, VisionWorker sentinel Checkpoint bracket for CDP tab activation.
steps: ask gpt path: ChromeLauncher spawn minimized -> CDP port 9222 attach -> editor target -> send prompt
ask claude path: same as gpt but claude.ai target + CoWork dismiss before send
ask gemini path: same Chrome CDP with Gemini copyright dialog dismiss
ask triad: parallel fan-out to gpt+claude+gemini each with own focus-steal sentinel
Sentinel bails silently if user-idle <1.5s mid-retry (prevents fighting intentional user focus switch)
VisionWorker CheckpointFocus bracket catches theft at the CDP-call seam not at end of pipeline
author: claude
